transcript: Even though you've never been to this place, you've seen it hundreds of times. I'll tell you why. Warariki Beach in New Zealand is famed for its archway islands and golden sand. Travel here and you'll hopefully run into the weirdest birds on Earth. But the reason you're probably familiar with this place is because it is the screensaver for Windows 10.
